name: albumentationsx-mcp
description: Preview and tune bounded local computer-vision augmentations with AlbumentationsX.
long_description: Use AlbumentationsX from Claude Desktop to inspect local images, generate reproducible augmentation previews, tune transforms from visual feedback, and export evidence. The extension reads only from the dataset directory you select and writes only to the artifact directory you select.

allowed_directory.title: Allowed image directory
allowed_directory.description: Only local root from which images and annotations may be read.

artifact_directory.title: Preview artifact directory
artifact_directory.description: Local root where generated previews and exports may be written.

max_preview_runs.title: Maximum preview runs
max_preview_runs.description: Maximum number of indexed preview runs retained by the local server.
